name: MGM-2A "Ixion"
description: The Ixion improves on the Phaethon with a multi-arm articulated chassis, allowing it to reconfigure anchor points mid-operation. Its primary excavation module uses a contra-rotating cutter paired with a pneumatic suction manifold, capturing liberated fragments before they escape the micro-gravity well. A secondary screening drum separates coarse from fine material in-situ. Suited to C-type and S-type near-Earth asteroids.
